pages.text: I kept it hidden, safe and sound, In my drawer of socks. I once had a dream, so small and light, I kept it in a box.

blocks.text: I kept it hidden, safe and sound, In my drawer of socks.
I once had a dream, so small and light, I kept it in a box.

pages.text: This tiny dream, I had, you see, Was mostly about me …

blocks.text: This tiny dream, I had, you see, Was mostly about me …

pages.text: SpaceSelfie! … who I’d be, and where I’d go, And what I’d one day see.

blocks.text: … who I’d be, and where I’d go, And what I’d one day see.

pages.text: At first, it was a little dream, Until one day it grew, And so I took it out for air, To show my dream to you.

blocks.text: At first, it was a little dream, Until one day it grew,
And so I took it out for air, To show my dream to you.

pages.text: And then my dream, it got so big, I had to let it out ...

blocks.text: And then my dream, it got so big, I had to let it out ...

pages.text: I took it to the playground, And watched it bounce about.

blocks.text: I took it to the playground, And watched it bounce about.

pages.text: Then all the kids, they saw my dream, And said, “We want one too!” I said to them, “Ok, no probs.” And told them what to do. Wow!!! Awesome! What??

blocks.text: Then all the kids, they saw my dream, And said, “We want one too!” I said to them, “Ok, no probs.” And told them what to do.

pages.text: “Well, first you think of what you want. Believe it with your heart.

blocks.text: “Well, first you think of what you want. Believe it with your heart.

pages.text: To get a dream as big as mine, This is the place to start.”

blocks.text: To get a dream as big as mine, This is the place to start.”

pages.text: “And once it’s big enough,” I said. “You’ve got to let it free To fly up high across the world, For all the world to see.”

blocks.text: “And once it’s big enough,” I said. “You’ve got to let it free To fly up high across the world, For all the world to see.”

pages.text: And at that point, my big old dream, Which once was in a drawer … Shook and climbed, Took to the sky …

blocks.text: And at that point, my big old dream, Which once was in a drawer … Shook and climbed, Took to the sky …

pages.text: And soared ... and soared … ... and soared.
